question_intent: Find the name of the employee who handled the order with the highest total extended price in the year 1997

plan.question_intent: Find the name of the employee who handled the order with the highest total extended price in the year 1997
plan.detail_query: SELECT o.orderid, o.orderdate, e.firstname, e.lastname, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_price FROM orders o JOIN employees e ON o.employeeid = e.employeeid JOIN order_details od ON od.orderid = o.orderid WHERE strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997' GROUP BY o.orderid, o.orderdate, e.firstname, e.lastname ORDER BY total_price DESC LIMIT 5

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT o.orderid, o.employeeid, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_price
join_clauses: JOIN order_details od ON od.orderid = o.orderid
blocks.notes: This block calculates the total extended price for each order in 1997

blocks.name: leaf_2
blocks.notes: This block finds the maximum total extended price among all orders in 1997

blocks.name: root
join_clauses: JOIN employees e ON o.employeeid = e.employeeid
JOIN {{leaf_2}} AS l2 ON o.orderid = l2.orderid AND SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) = l2.max_price
blocks.notes: This block finds the name of the employee who handled the order with the highest total extended price in 1997

LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN "order details" od ON od.orderid = o.orderid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM orders o
JOIN "order details" od ON od.orderid = o.orderid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM orders o
JOIN "order details" od ON od.orderid = o.orderid
WHERE (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')
LIMIT 5

SELECT o.orderid, o.employeeid, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_price
FROM orders o
JOIN "order details" od ON od.orderid = o.orderid
WHERE (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')
GROUP BY o.orderid, o.employeeid

build_logs.notes: This block finds the maximum total extended price among all orders in 1997

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT o.orderid, o.employeeid, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_price
FROM orders o
JOIN "order details" od ON od.orderid = o.orderid
WHERE (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')
GROUP BY o.orderid, o.employeeid)
LIMIT 5

SELECT orderid, MAX(total_price) AS max_price
FROM (SELECT o.orderid, o.employeeid, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_price
FROM orders o
JOIN "order details" od ON od.orderid = o.orderid
WHERE (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')
GROUP BY o.orderid, o.employeeid)

LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN {{leaf_2}} AS l2 ON o.orderid = l2.orderid AND SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) = l2.max_price
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM orders o
JOIN employees e ON o.employeeid = e.employeeid
JOIN (SELECT orderid, MAX(total_price) AS max_price
FROM (SELECT o.orderid, o.employeeid, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_price
FROM orders o
JOIN "order details" od ON od.orderid = o.orderid
WHERE (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')
GROUP BY o.orderid, o.employeeid)) AS l2 ON o.orderid = l2.orderid AND SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) = l2.max_price
LIMIT 5

JOIN (SELECT orderid, MAX(total_price) AS max_price
FROM (SELECT o.orderid, o.employeeid, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_price
FROM orders o
JOIN "order details" od ON od.orderid = o.orderid
WHERE (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')
GROUP BY o.orderid, o.employeeid)) AS l2 ON o.orderid = l2.orderid AND SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) = l2.max_price
LIMIT 5': misuse of aggregate function SUM()

steps.clause: JOIN {{leaf_2}} AS l2 ON o.orderid = l2.orderid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM orders o
JOIN employees e ON o.employeeid = e.employeeid
JOIN (SELECT orderid, MAX(total_price) AS max_price
FROM (SELECT o.orderid, o.employeeid, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_price
FROM orders o
JOIN "order details" od ON od.orderid = o.orderid
WHERE (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')
GROUP BY o.orderid, o.employeeid)) AS l2 ON o.orderid = l2.orderid
LIMIT 5

preview.notes: Margaret holds a BA in English literature from Concordia College (1958) and an MA from the American Institute of Culinary Arts (1966).  She was assigned to the London office temporarily from July through November 1992.

steps.sql:
SELECT e.firstname || ' ' || e.lastname AS employee_name
FROM orders o
JOIN employees e ON o.employeeid = e.employeeid
JOIN (SELECT orderid, MAX(total_price) AS max_price
FROM (SELECT o.orderid, o.employeeid, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_price
FROM orders o
JOIN "order details" od ON od.orderid = o.orderid
WHERE (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')
GROUP BY o.orderid, o.employeeid)) AS l2 ON o.orderid = l2.orderid

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.employee_revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM (SELECT e.employeeid, e.firstname, e.lastname, SUM(od.quantity * od.unitprice) AS employee_revenue
FROM employees e
JOIN orders o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
JOIN "order details" od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
WHERE (e.region = 'WA') AND (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')
GROUP BY e.employeeid, e.firstname, e.lastname) AS leaf_1

question: What is the name of the employee who processed the order with the highest total price in 1997?
